file_insights.purpose: Centralized public API for module loader functionality with organized sections for module definition, service, controller, routes, types, and helpers
key_exports: type definitions for ModuleInfo, ModuleManifest, ModuleStatus

file_insights.purpose: REST API controller implementing admin-level module management endpoints with comprehensive route handlers
key_features: List operations (modules, summaries, active, core, stats, menu items, permissions)

file_insights.purpose: NestJS/tsyringe module definition with dependency injection setup, lifecycle hooks, and service initialization
Route definitions, endpoint metadata, helper functions for module status/category labels, icons, and colors with path builders
Core service implementing module lifecycle management, manifest reading, activation/deactivation logic, dependency checking, and health monitoring
Comprehensive TypeScript type definitions for module system including manifests, requests, responses, events, hooks, and type guards
Module metadata and configuration for the Module Loader core module itself

patterns_discovered.description: Organized index.ts with clearly sectioned exports (Module Definition, Service, Controller, Routes, Types) with detailed JSDoc examples
patterns_discovered.benefit: Improves maintainability and discoverability of public API

patterns_discovered.description: Extensive TypeScript types for all API contracts including requests, responses, events, hooks, and type guards
patterns_discovered.benefit: Strong type safety and self-documenting API contracts

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent use of @Authorized decorator on all controller methods with specific permission strings (module.read, module.activate, etc.)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Declarative security model, easier to audit permissions

patterns_discovered.description: Business logic separated into ModuleLoaderService with dependency injection via @inject decorator
Route configuration exports include helper functions for status/category labels, icons, colors (getModuleStatusLabel, getModuleStatusIcon, etc.)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reusable UI helper functions with consistent naming patterns

patterns_discovered.description: Comprehensive JSDoc comments on all exported items with @example blocks showing usage patterns
patterns_discovered.benefit: Excellent documentation for IDE autocomplete and developer reference

patterns_discovered.description: RESTful endpoints following consistent patterns: GET for queries, POST for actions with snake_case paths
patterns_discovered.benefit: Predictable API, easy to learn and use

patterns_discovered.description: Use of tsyringe decorators (@injectable, @inject) for IoC container integration
patterns_discovered.benefit: Decoupled dependencies, easier testing and configuration

gotchas_discovered.description: Module activation requires checking and potentially activating dependencies first; circular dependencies must be handled
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Service includes checkDependencies() and manages dependency resolution with conflict detection

gotchas_discovered.description: Core modules cannot be deactivated; attempting to do so should return an error
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: isModuleCore() type guard and service-level validation prevents deactivation

gotchas_discovered.description: Module manifests must be parsed and validated; malformed manifests can crash the loader
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Service includes manifest parsing with error handling and validation logic

gotchas_discovered.description: Modules declare permissions; permission strings must be collected and made available to authorization system
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: getAllPermissions() method aggregates permissions from all active modules

gotchas_discovered.description: Specific routes like /summaries, /active, /core must be defined BEFORE the generic /:id route in routing-controllers
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Route definitions appear in correct order in controller

approach_outcome.implementation_scope: Complete Module Loader module with manifest reading and activation logic
key_accomplishments: Created comprehensive module loader service with manifest parsing and activation/deactivation logic
Implemented full REST API with 18+ endpoints for module management
Established robust type system for module manifests, lifecycle events, and API contracts
Integrated dependency injection using tsyringe for testability
Added authorization decorators for permission-based access control
Provided helper functions for UI rendering (status/category labels, icons, colors)
Implemented dependency checking and conflict resolution
Added health check and module stats endpoints
architecture_decisions: Separated concerns: Controller (HTTP), Service (business logic), Types (contracts), Routes (configuration)
Used barrel export pattern for clean public API surface
Implemented hook system for before/after lifecycle events
Designed permission model with specific strings per operation
Used type guards for runtime validation of module status and categories

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive unit tests for ModuleLoaderService covering module activation, deactivation, dependency resolution, and error scenarios
recommendations.rationale: Module loader is critical infrastructure; tests ensure reliability and prevent regression

recommendations.recommendation: Create integration tests for ModuleLoaderController endpoints with different permission scenarios
recommendations.rationale: Authorization logic is security-critical and needs comprehensive coverage

recommendations.recommendation: Create a module manifest schema documentation file with examples of valid module.json structures
recommendations.rationale: Module developers need clear specification of manifest format

recommendations.recommendation: Add detailed error messages for dependency resolution failures, including suggestions for resolving conflicts
recommendations.rationale: Helps developers debug module loading issues quickly

recommendations.recommendation: Add logging statements at key points in module lifecycle (manifest parsing, activation, deactivation, error cases)
recommendations.rationale: Critical for troubleshooting production module loading issues

recommendations.recommendation: Add pagination support to the list modules endpoint for systems with many installed modules
recommendations.rationale: Improves API performance when dealing with large numbers of modules

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding support for module versioning and compatibility checking between module versions
recommendations.rationale: Important for managing module updates without breaking dependencies
